contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: AUM: ?type=recalculate_aum operator escape hatch + landing stat alignment
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/307
  
  Details:
  After the calculateAUM refactor (tokenomics#306) the landing-page AUM stat was still showing the old 32,251.72 because the Performance Statistics 'AUM' cell only gets overwritten when the cron loop fires (which calls calculateAUM AND updatePerformanceStatistic). The new doGet branch ?type=recalculate_aum mirrors that two-step on-demand: calls calculateAUM() to get the fresh value (also refreshes the aum_breakdown cache as a side effect), then writes it to Performance Statistics in the same shot.
  
  Used immediately after the refactor to bring the landing-page stat into alignment with /aum (both now ,868.36). Future formula changes can curl this endpoint to apply without touching the Apps Script editor.
  
  Verification (deploy @15):
    curl '...?type=recalculate_aum' → 27868.363009974822
    curl '...' (default)            → AUM = 27868.363009974822 (updatedDate fresh)
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#307 (squash 6c55499; GAS deploy @15)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
